requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance and Labelling — MEM Appliance Energy Programmes
requirement_topic.zh: 能效与标签——能源矿产部家电能效计划
requirement_topic.zht: 能效與標籤——能源礦產部家電能效計劃

summary.en: Laos energy policy is led by the Ministry of Energy and Mines, with appliance efficiency initiatives commonly developed through regional ASEAN energy-efficiency cooperation and standards that reference IEC test methods. For household refrigerators, importers should confirm whether the current Laos programme requires MEPS, an energy label, registration, or importer-held test evidence for the specific model. The practical test basis is expected to align with the IEC 62552 refrigerator performance family where adopted. China Energy Label grades and GB 12021.2 calculations should be treated as input data only, not as a Laos label or Laos MEPS pass.
summary.zh: 老挝能源政策由能源矿产部主导，家电能效倡议通常通过东盟区域能效合作和引用IEC测试方法的标准推进。对于家用电冰箱，进口商应确认当前老挝计划是否要求特定型号符合MEPS、加施能效标签、注册或保存测试证据。实际测试依据预计与经采纳的IEC 62552冰箱性能测试体系对齐。中国能效标识等级和GB 12021.2计算应仅作为输入数据，不应视为老挝标签或老挝MEPS合格。
summary.zht: 寮國能源政策由能源礦產部主導，家電能效倡議通常通過東盟區域能效合作和引用IEC測試方法的標準推進。對於家用電冰箱，進口商應確認當前寮國計劃是否要求特定型號符合MEPS、加施能效標籤、登記或保存測試證據。實際測試依據預計與經採納的IEC 62552冰箱性能測試體系對齊。中國能效標識等級和GB 12021.2計算應僅作為輸入數據，不應視為寮國標籤或寮國MEPS合格。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Energy and Mines appliance energy-efficiency policy and programmes
ASEAN SHINE / ASEAN energy-efficiency harmonisation references where adopted
IEC 62552 series — household refrigerating appliances performance and energy-consumption test methods, where adopted by Laos

summary.en: China regulates household refrigerator energy performance under GB 12021.2, with the China Energy Label system used for market placement. Chinese manufacturers often hold measured energy-consumption data, adjusted volume calculations, and a China grade. Those records are useful for engineering comparison, but Laos may apply different programme thresholds, label artwork, registration steps, or importer responsibilities.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 12021.2监管家用电冰箱能效，并通过中国能效标识制度进行市场投放。中国制造商通常持有实测耗电量数据、调整容积计算和中国能效等级。这些记录对工程对比有用，但老挝可能适用不同的计划门槛、标签样式、注册步骤或进口商责任。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 12021.2監管家用電冰箱能效，並通過中國能效標識制度進行市場投放。中國製造商通常持有實測耗電量數據、調整容積計算和中國能效等級。這些記錄對工程對比有用，但寮國可能適用不同的計劃門檻、標籤樣式、登記步驟或進口商責任。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — energy consumption limits and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators
GB 4706.13 / GB 12021.2 baseline for China household refrigerators

gap.en: Energy data may be technically portable if both sides reference IEC 62552 methods, but the compliance result is not portable. Confirm Laos MEPS or label status per model with MEM/DOSM and the importer, recalculate to the Laos programme if a threshold exists, and prepare any Laos label or registration record rather than shipping with only the China Energy Label.
gap.zh: 若双方均引用IEC 62552方法，能效数据在技术上可能可迁移，但合规结果不可迁移。应按型号向能源矿产部/DOSM及进口商确认老挝MEPS或标签状态；如存在门槛，应按老挝计划重新计算，并准备老挝标签或注册记录，而不是仅凭中国能效标识出货。
gap.zht: 若雙方均引用IEC 62552方法，能效數據在技術上可能可遷移，但合規結果不可遷移。應按型號向能源礦產部/DOSM及進口商確認寮國MEPS或標籤狀態；如存在門檻，應按寮國計劃重新計算，並準備寮國標籤或登記記錄，而不是僅憑中國能效標識出貨。

mandatory_status.target: Programme-specific — confirm with MEM/DOSM whether MEPS, energy labelling, registration, or importer-held evidence is mandatory for the refrigerator model
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 and China Energy Label apply to refrigerators sold in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy and Mines, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat the China Energy Label as a Laos energy label. Use GB 12021.2 data as a technical starting point, then confirm MEM/DOSM programme status, thresholds, and registration or label duties for the exact refrigerator model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应把中国能效标识视为老挝能效标签。可将GB 12021.2数据作为技术起点，但须针对具体冰箱型号确认能源矿产部/DOSM计划状态、门槛以及注册或标签义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應把中國能效標識視為寮國能效標籤。可將GB 12021.2數據作為技術起點，但須針對具體冰箱型號確認能源礦產部/DOSM計劃狀態、門檻以及登記或標籤義務。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage and Frequency Fit — EDL 230 V / 50 Hz vs China 220/380 V / 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率适配——EDL 230 V / 50 Hz 对比中国220/380 V / 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率適配——EDL 230 V / 50 Hz 對比中國220/380 V / 50 Hz

summary.en: Laos household supply is nominally 230 V at 50 Hz through the national utility EDL. The frequency matches China’s 50 Hz system, so compressor frequency, timing, and energy-test assumptions are easier to carry over than for 60 Hz markets. The nominal voltage differs from China’s common 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase system. Export refrigerators should therefore have a rating plate, plug/cord set, insulation coordination, protective components, and control electronics validated for 230 V / 50 Hz service and local supply tolerance.
summary.zh: 老挝民用供电由国家电力公司EDL提供，标称为230 V、50 Hz。频率与中国50 Hz系统一致，因此相较60 Hz市场，压缩机频率、定时和能效测试假设更容易沿用。标称电压不同于中国常见220 V单相和380 V三相系统。因此出口冰箱的铭牌、插头/电源线、绝缘配合、保护元件和控制电子设备应按230 V / 50 Hz使用及本地供电容差验证。
summary.zht: 寮國民用供電由國家電力公司EDL提供，標稱為230 V、50 Hz。頻率與中國50 Hz系統一致，因此相較60 Hz市場，壓縮機頻率、定時和能效測試假設更容易沿用。標稱電壓不同於中國常見220 V單相和380 V三相系統。因此出口冰箱的銘牌、插頭/電源線、絕緣配合、保護元件和控制電子設備應按230 V / 50 Hz使用及本地供電容差驗證。

standards_or_laws: EDL national electricity supply context — nominal household supply 230 V / 50 Hz
IEC 60335-1 / IEC 60335-2-24 rated-voltage safety provisions, where adopted by Laos
Importer technical file covering rating plate, plug/cord, and voltage-tolerance evidence

summary.en: China’s domestic refrigerator baseline is normally designed for 220 V single-phase, with China’s wider electrical system also using 380 V three-phase, all at 50 Hz. GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1 safety testing and GB 12021.2 energy data are developed around that China-market rating. A 220-240 V / 50 Hz product rating usually covers Laos, but a 220 V-only rating plate should be reviewed before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国国内冰箱基线通常按220 V单相设计，中国更广泛电力系统还使用380 V三相，频率均为50 Hz。GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1安全测试和GB 12021.2能效数据围绕中国市场额定值形成。若产品额定为220-240 V / 50 Hz，通常可覆盖老挝；但仅标220 V的铭牌应在出货前复核。
summary.zht: 中國國內冰箱基線通常按220 V單相設計，中國更廣泛電力系統還使用380 V三相，頻率均為50 Hz。GB 4706.13 / GB 4706.1安全測試和GB 12021.2能效數據圍繞中國市場額定值形成。若產品額定為220-240 V / 50 Hz，通常可覆蓋寮國；但僅標220 V的銘牌應在出貨前複核。

standards_or_laws: China mains supply — 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
GB 4706.13 / GB 12021.2 baseline for China household refrigerators

gap.en: There is no frequency gap because both markets use 50 Hz. The practical gap is nominal voltage and documentation: confirm the shipped SKU is rated for 230 V, not only China 220 V, and confirm plug/cord and markings match Laos buyer and importer expectations. This is usually a validation and labelling task rather than a compressor redesign task.
gap.zh: 两地均使用50 Hz，因此不存在频率差距。实际差距是标称电压和文件：确认出货SKU额定覆盖230 V，而不仅是中国220 V，并确认插头/电源线和标识符合老挝买方及进口商预期。这通常是验证和标签任务，而非压缩机重新设计任务。
gap.zht: 兩地均使用50 Hz，因此不存在頻率差距。實際差距是標稱電壓和文件：確認出貨SKU額定覆蓋230 V，而不僅是中國220 V，並確認插頭/電源線和標識符合寮國買方及進口商預期。這通常是驗證和標籤任務，而非壓縮機重新設計任務。

mandatory_status.target: Informational electrical-fit item enforced through product safety, importer inspection, and buyer requirements; Laos household supply is 230 V / 50 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic baseline is 220/380 V / 50 Hz, with GB 4706.13 and GB 12021.2 evidence built around the China rating

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos shares China’s 50 Hz frequency, so the key check is the 230 V rating and destination plug/marking file. A 220-240 V / 50 Hz refrigerator is usually well positioned, but a China-only 220 V marking should be corrected or justified before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝与中国同为50 Hz，关键检查是230 V额定值以及目的地插头/标识文件。220-240 V / 50 Hz冰箱通常较适配，但仅标中国220 V的铭牌应在出货前修正或说明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國與中國同為50 Hz，關鍵檢查是230 V額定值以及目的地插頭/標識文件。220-240 V / 50 Hz冰箱通常較適配，但僅標中國220 V的銘牌應在出貨前修正或說明。
